title: Ojha's Ambiance
description: A small mod that adds tons of ambiance, flowers, and paintings.
body: In Ojha's Ambiance, expect your world to be glowing bright with tons of new blocks and items. There are new food sources, such as escargot and large mushrooms, as well as new music discs. 11 New paintings to find, in all different aspect ratios. Are you stuck in the Nether? No worries! Just get some Nether Iron Ore. Stuck in the overword? Also no worries! Just grab some quartz from a cave. The sniffer can now dig up 2 new flowers, the Sutolia and Swiftgrower. With all these features and more, don't fret when thinking to download this mod. Happy caving!
